query:
-- Count total orders
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 END) as paid_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending_checkout' THEN 1 END) as pending_checkout_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) as cancelled_orders
FROM orders;

-- Count passengers
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_passengers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) as orders_with_passengers
FROM passengers;

-- Find orders without passengers
SELECT 
  id, short_id, customer_name, status, created_at
FROM orders
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT order_id FROM passengers)
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

-- Find orphaned passengers (order_id doesn't exist)
SELECT 
  p.id, p.name, p.order_id, p.status
FROM passengers p
WHERE p.order_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM orders)
LIMIT 20;
